tools.name: cpp_resolve_symbol
tools.description: Resolve a fuzzy C++ symbol reference to exact symbol candidates.

tools.name: cpp_semantic_query
tools.description: Run a normalized semantic query over C++ code entities, scopes, filters, and relations. Use the 'fields' parameter to limit which fields are returned per item and keep responses small. Only the requested fields are returned — include "symbol_id" if you need results for a follow-up cpp_describe_symbol call. For listing method names use: action=list, entity=method, scope={file:...}, fields=["qualified_name","signature","access"]. Important: entity=method returns regular methods only and excludes constructors and destructors. To list all member functions of a class, run three queries and merge results: entity=method, entity=constructor, and entity=destructor. For follow-up describe calls also include "symbol_id" in fields. IMPORTANT: scope.file must be a workspace-root-relative path (e.g. "VSC/FdcSP/src/RecBoardInterface.h") or an absolute path. Bare filenames like "RecBoardInterface.h" are NOT resolved by filename search — they will fail with NO_TARGET_FILES. Always use file_search to find the full relative path first if you do not already know it.

tools.name: cpp_describe_symbol
tools.description: Return a normalized summary of one exact symbol.
